arts.ttl: Stats point to Chelsea struggles continuing for now
arts.sum: We've reached the halfway point of the Premier League season, and it's been a typically fascinating and unpredictable one for Chelsea and their fans. There were a variety of opinions about how the Blues would get on this season, but even the most optimistic of pundits didn't have them doing so well that they had […]

arts.sum: Millwall starlet Romain Esse is now wanted by AFC Bournemouth as well as Crystal Palace, according to Football… The post Bournemouth set to rival Crystal Palace for Millwall star’s signature appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Chelsea want £65m for Christopher Nkunku as Bayern Munich consider January move
arts.sum: Chelsea are keen on a move for 19-year-old Bayern forward Mathys Tel to replace Nkunku if he departs

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea now face double whammy as Bayern Munich's stance on Mathys Tel transfer emerges
arts.sum: The Blues have some convincing to do.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Chelsea BOMB, Man Utd's NEW Rashford, Kvaratskhelia DONE
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including news on a sensational'swap' deal between Chelsea and Bayern, the latest on Khvicha Kvaratskhelia and Man Utd's potential replacement for Marcus Rashford . Speaking on his YouTube channel, Romano revealed that three Chelsea players are expected to depart the club shortly, with Renato Veiga, Carney Chukwuemeka and Axel Disasi on the way out.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace fear Chelsea will recall Trevoh Chalobah from loan as Olivier Glasner confirms latest
arts.sum: Chelsea have option to bring back Chalobah in January as they consider ways to ease their defensive shortage

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds to include in-demand teenager in package to sign Bournemouth's Antoine Semenyo?
arts.sum: Liverpool will reportedly consider using an in-demand teenager as part of a transfer package to sign Bournemouth attacker Antoine Semenyo.

arts.ttl: Chelsea handed Noni Madueke boost for Bournemouth as Enzo Maresca makes Reece James admission
arts.sum: "For sure, full-backs being used in that way, up and down, for them, it is probably physically using more energy," Maresca said on James' position. Romeo Lavia and Reece James, meanwhile, made their comebacks from injury against Morecambe with both playing 45 minutes.
